category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Ruby to JavaScript transpiler; official docs say Opal is a Ruby to JavaScript compiler at https://opalrb.com/docs/guides/v1.8.0/getting_started.html.
display_name_sources: Official website and docs use Opal at https://opalrb.com/ and https://opalrb.com/docs/guides/v1.8.0/getting_started.html; source_facts.name is opal.
docs_sources: Official Opal docs provide getting started and compiler documentation; official repository README is at https://github.com/opal/opal.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/opal/opal, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs at https://opalrb.com/docs/guides/v1.8.0/getting_started.html identify Ruby-to-JavaScript compilation, runtime/corelib, and CLI tooling.
